name: assets-prefab-create
title: Assets / Prefab / Create
description: Create a prefab from a GameObject in the current active scene. The prefab will be saved in the project assets at the specified path. Use 'gameobject-find' tool to find the target GameObject first.

parameters.name: prefabAssetPath
parameters.description: Save path for the new prefab. Example: "Assets/Prefabs/MyPrefab.prefab"

parameters.name: gameObjectRef
parameters.description: Source GameObject reference. SCHEMA: {"name":"ObjectName"} or {"instanceID":12345} or {"path":"hierarchy/path"}

parameters.name: replaceGameObjectWithPrefab
parameters.description: If true, the prefab will replace the GameObject in the scene.
